name: Orange Chicken- Bsnx01a
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook all ingredients for the sauce over medium heat, stirring constantly until thick and glossy.
2. Pour sauce over frozen chicken breast cutlets.
3. Bake uncovered at 350°F for approximately 35 minutes. This sauce may also be used for broiled or microwaved cutlets.
From a bag of Empire Individualy Quick Frozen Chicken Breast Cutlets.
